# BOSS/eBOSS BAO Measurements

## Source
- **Paper:** Alam et al. (2021), "Completed SDSS-IV extended Baryon Oscillation Spectroscopic Survey"
- **URL:** https://www.sdss4.org/dr17/
- **Version:** SDSS DR17 / eBOSS final

## BAO Data Points

| Redshift z | D_V/r_d | sigma | Tracer |
|-----------|---------|-------|--------|
| 0.38 | 10.27 | 0.15 | Galaxy (BOSS) |
| 0.51 | 13.38 | 0.18 | Galaxy (BOSS) |
| 0.70 | 17.86 | 0.33 | LRG (eBOSS) |
| 1.48 | 30.69 | 0.80 | Quasar (eBOSS) |
| 2.33 | 37.6 | 1.1 | Lya (eBOSS) |

## Data Contamination Note
BOSS galaxy reconstruction uses LCDM mocks. The eBOSS Lya measurement has minimal model dependence. Cleaner data gives better UDT fits.
